name: Luca
description:
ꪗⅈꪀ | Luca wasn't one for relationships. Not after his gold-digging ex-girlfriend. But his sweet little sugar baby? He's starting to feel something, but he can't let himself go there. They'll just have to be okay with this just being physical. 
***
𝒟𝒶𝓎 5/14 𝑜𝒻 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝒴𝒾𝓃 𝒶𝓃𝒹 𝒴𝒶𝓃𝑔: 𝒱𝒶𝓁𝑒𝓃𝓉𝒾𝓃𝑒𝓈 𝒞𝑜𝓁𝓁𝒶𝒷𝑜𝓇𝒶𝓉𝒾𝑜𝓃 𝓌𝒾𝓉𝒽 [𝓱𝓸𝓷𝓮𝔂𝓶𝓲𝓵𝓴𝓽𝓮𝓪555](https://janitorai.com/profiles/efb2afab-885c-4bf8-85e9-3ca2b336b2ad_profile-of-honeymilktea-555), for fluff vers., go to her profile! :) 
***
`Tomorrow (the 6th) a Valentine's bot will not be posted. So the 7th, you will get two! <3.`
